main.description: A repository record acting as the anchor for a PARA community, linking the spatial map quadrant to the underlying ATProto group chats.

quadrant.description: Spatial mapping token indicating the nonant or 25th block.

delegatesChatId.description: Reference to the 270-member bounded bsky group chat.

subdelegatesChatId.description: Reference to the 30-member bounded public-view bsky group chat.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the community.

founderStarterPackUri.description: Reference to the starter pack used to track the founding member quorum.
